stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
stone_skin.desc: Take 3 less damage from every hit (min 1).

bulwark.name: Bulwark
bulwark.desc: Take 30% less damage from non-element attacks.

predators_edge.name: Predator's Edge
predators_edge.desc: +50% damage when target is below 50% HP.

pristine.name: Pristine
pristine.desc: First attack of battle deals double damage.

photosynthesis.name: Photosynthesis
photosynthesis.desc: Heal 6% max HP at start of every turn.

vampire_touch.name: Vampire Touch
vampire_touch.desc: Heals are +50% stronger and can overheal to 125% max HP.

aquaveil.name: Aquaveil
aquaveil.desc: Once per battle, when you would drop below 50% HP, heal to 50%.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.desc: When swapping in, heal 15% max HP.

riposte.name: Riposte
riposte.desc: When hit, deal 25% of damage taken back.

iron_will.name: Iron Will
iron_will.desc: Immune to stat debuffs and statuses (soaking, dazed, cursed).

hex_eater.name: Hex Eater
hex_eater.desc: Cleanse one debuff at start of each turn.

featherweight.name: Featherweight
featherweight.desc: Win all speed and priority ties.

adrenal_surge.name: Adrenal Surge
adrenal_surge.desc: When taking a hit for 30%+ max HP, gain +30% ATK for 3 turns.

spite.name: Spite
spite.desc: When you take a critical hit, gain +30% ATK for 3 turns.

reflective_aura.name: Reflective Aura
reflective_aura.desc: Reflect 15% of all damage taken to the attacker.

pyromancer.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer.desc: Burns you apply tick for 8% (instead of 5%) and last 5 turns.

poisonous.name: Poisonous
poisonous.desc: On hit: 30% chance to apply 1 stack of soaking.

curse_weaver.name: Curse Weaver
curse_weaver.desc: When applying any status, also apply 1 turn of dazed.

status_lord.name: Status Lord
status_lord.desc: +30% ATK for each unique status on the opponent.

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.desc: On swap-in: gain +50% ATK for the turn.

sentinel.name: Sentinel
sentinel.desc: When this creature is on bench, heal 5% of max HP per turn.

tag_out.name: Tag Out
tag_out.desc: When this creature swaps out, the incoming ally is cleansed.

rearguard.name: Rearguard
rearguard.desc: On bench, gain +25% all stats. Cleared on swap-in.

pivot_master.name: Pivot Master
pivot_master.desc: Cursed-on-swap damage is halved when this creature swaps out.

spotter.name: Spotter
spotter.desc: Bench ally takes 30% less damage from start-of-turn ticks.

twin_soul.name: Twin Soul
twin_soul.desc: Buffs you apply also apply 50% strength to the bench ally.

dark_pact.name: Dark Pact
dark_pact.desc: Lose 25% max HP at battle start. +50% ATK for the rest of the battle.

mortal_coil.name: Mortal Coil
mortal_coil.desc: Below 25% HP: +50% ATK and +50% SPD until end of battle.

slow_burn.name: Slow Burn
slow_burn.desc: Each turn you survive, +10% ATK (stacking, max 5).

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.desc: Cannot be healed by any source. +40% ATK at all times.

doubling_down.name: Doubling Down
doubling_down.desc: Critical hits deal 3× instead of 1.6×, only while above 50% HP.

misty_form.name: Misty Form
misty_form.desc: 25% chance to fully evade any attack.

eldritch_sight.name: Eldritch Sight
eldritch_sight.desc: Your attacks ignore the type chart — always 1× damage, never super effective or resisted.

reckless_heart.name: Reckless Heart
reckless_heart.desc: Self-damage from your own moves is reduced by 50%.

zealot.name: Zealot
zealot.desc: After using a buff, your next attack deals +50% damage.

patient_hunter.name: Patient Hunter
patient_hunter.desc: Each turn without attacking, your next attack hits 50% harder (cumulative, max 3 stacks).

scavenger.name: Scavenger
scavenger.desc: When opponent uses a buff, you also gain a copy.

dreadful.name: Dreadful
dreadful.desc: On battle start: enemy active loses 15% max HP.

prepared.name: Prepared
prepared.desc: Enter battle with +1 stack of soaking on the enemy active.
